NAVAREA XIX 5/22
 BARENTS SEA
 1. DUE TO ARTILLERY FIRING THE USE OF THE FOLLOWING TRAFFIC SEPARATION SCHEME AND RECOMMENDED ROUTE ARE TEMPORARILY SUSPENDED FROM 240000 TO 271900 UTC JAN 22:
 A. TSS OFF VARDOE
 B. RECOMMENDED ROUTE BETWEEN TSS OFF VARDOE AND TSS OFF SLETTNES 
 2. NORWEGIAN COASTAL WARNINGS 77/22, 78/22  AND NAVAREA XIX 6/22 REFERS 
 3. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 272000 UTC JAN 22
